category_sources: Official homepage describes STUNTMAN as open source STUN server software with client and libraries.
source_facts.description says this is an implementation of the STUN protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the package name stuntman.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is linked from the project homepage source download.
Official homepage is the main project documentation and download surface.
repo_sources: Official homepage links latest stable Unix/Linux/Mac sources to https://github.com/jselbie/stunserver.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists UDP/TCP, IPv4/IPv6, WebRTC-ready, STUN server, client, and library features.
